data.body: STACK COMMIT 6 (#7 nit-suppress grusome-uncheerful-nematode): 66956c0. SCOPED DOWN per handoff: shipped only the feasible docs+llm-prompts nit down-rank; SPLIT the new-behavior-without-test detector to discovered_from follow-up idea acoustic-coveting-turaco (needs bespoke diff-parse+test-correlation seam; Engine-B is pattern-rules-on-code, extract_references_from_diff is imports-only). Impl: nit_suppressed:true on docs+llm-prompts in criteria_routing.json; registry.nit_suppressed_criteria helper; code_review_decide partition demotes advisory findings whose criteria ALL nit-suppressed -> dropped w/ reason 'nit-suppressed' (post-pass3, partition-only, BLOCK never demoted, empty-criteria guarded); test_code_review_nit_routing.py(11). Plan grounded vs origin/main (c005f242b, stack-independent). 2 BLOCK rounds remediated (undefined reason-string tag; AC5 external-link not in-session-verifiable -> repo grep AC + title fix dropping detector). PASS+signed. Claimed no REBAR_GATE_REF. lint+mypy clean, 576 code-review tests green. 6/8 committed. STACK TIP now 66956c0 -> REBAR_GATE_REF for #8/#3. Closes DEFERRED to Gerrit Verified.
